title: BI reporting team broad production read access for cross-functional reporting
compensating_controls: PHI field-level masking via PostgreSQL row-level security policies; query audit logging with 18-month retention; all BI queries routed through dedicated read replica orion-prod-replica-bi; automated alerts for queries returning >5000 rows; quarterly PHI access review by Privacy Officer
review_outcome: Renewed — all compensating controls verified. PHI masking confirmed via audit. Extended to 2026-02-01.

title: Temporary write access for legacy EHR synchronization service
compensating_controls: Weekly sync job audit by DBA; all write operations logged to separate audit trail; sync limited to patient_records and billing tables only; bi-weekly data integrity check comparing legacy and production records
review_outcome: Expired — migration to FHIR API completed. Access should be reverted to read-only.

title: Development team access to de-identified production dataset for ML model training
compensating_controls: All PII fields replaced with synthetic data via Tonic.ai; dataset stored in isolated S3 bucket with encryption; access limited to 3 named researchers; quarterly re-evaluation of data freshness requirements
review_outcome: Renewed — de-identification verified by Privacy Officer. Extended to 2026-03-20.
